content.en:
"What about people?"

A famous Dao Ancestor incarnation continued to probe with his divine sense, but he did not detect any trace of Ye Tian.

It was as if Ye Tian had completely disappeared from heaven and earth, and there was no trace of him at all.

Seeing that Ye Tian could not be found, the Dao Ancestor incarnations stopped looking for it.

They hadn't realized the true value of the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar yet, so they weren't too heartbroken, and there were still many opportunities for the Heaven Splitting Sect, so there was no need to waste time looking for Ye Tian.

......

Small boundaries.

Ye Tian's figure appeared, and he immediately kept coughing up blood, and his entire body was constantly cracking and healing, which showed how seriously Ye Tian was injured.

"This time it's an adventure!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Originally, he shouldn't have taken such a risk, but the value of the Sky Splitting Divine Pillar was too great, and he couldn't help it.

Although the risk was great, in the end, he still won the Sky Splitting God Pillar, and this time the gain was simply too great.

With such a treasure, Ye Tian could cultivate six Dao Ancestors in the Terran Race in the future, and if the six Dao Ancestors sat in the Terran Race, the Terran would inevitably become the first major clan in the Dao Realm, or even the first major clan in the Chaos Realm.

Even with the help of the Heaven Splitting God Pillar, the human race can also cultivate a group of strong people, after all, the effect of the Heaven Splitting God Pillar's auxiliary cultivation is also very good, although it may not be able to help human geniuses promote to True Ancestor, but it can guarantee that they will be promoted to the rank of True Monarch.

"This time the injury is too serious, take care of the injury first!"

Ye Tian sat cross-legged, took out pieces of healing elixirs, and then urged the Blood River True Body to recover from his injuries.

Under the effect of the Blood River True Body, Ye Tian's injuries healed quickly, but the attack cast by the Dao Ancestor incarnation was a Dao Force attack, even if it was a weakened Dao Force, it was not an ordinary power, but a power that surpassed the True Monarch's divine power and the power of the True Ancestor, which was not easy to expel and recover, and it took a long time to recover.

In the process of Ye Tian's healing, the formations of the Heaven Splitting Sect were broken one by one, and many opportunities were exposed one by one.

However, from beginning to end, the other two great treasures of the Heaven Splitting Sect were not born.

However, the news about the three great treasures of the Heaven Splitting Sect slowly surfaced as the Heaven Splitting Sect continued to be studied, and many Dao Ancestor incarnations gradually knew the usefulness of the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar, and even knew that the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar could assist in merging the Dao and cultivating a full six Dao Ancestors, plus its usefulness to assist in cultivation, its value was no less than that of the Ancestral Monument!

Suddenly, Ye Tian became the target of everyone, and everyone wanted to seize the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar from Ye Tian.

-----------

Somewhere in the remains of the battlefield.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor also learned about Ye Tian's situation, and was immediately surprised: "This little disciple of mine is so bold, he actually snatched the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar from a bunch of Dao Ancestor incarnations, speaking of which, I am a little moved by the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar!"

However, he would not snatch the Heaven Splitting Pillar with his disciples.

The most important thing is that the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar is not helpful to him, and at his level, he is no longer much interested in cultivating forces, and what he wants more is to go further.

For example, he rarely cares about the Void Heaven One Vein, except for occasionally accepting a few disciples, and almost does not appear in front of the world.

But even if he accepts apprentices, he doesn't teach much, he basically lets go, except for one or two instructions at the most critical moments, he is almost in retreat or breaking into the dark forbidden realm at other times.

"My apprentice has a big opportunity, but don't worry about it, let's understand this sword mark in front of me!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor looked at the sword mark left in the void in front of him, and continued to comprehend.

This is not an ordinary sword mark, but a sword mark left by a supreme powerhouse, although it is still a sword cut by a powerhouse at the level of Dao Ancestor, it is much stronger than the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

According to the many information left behind by the fragments of the battlefield ruins of the Divine Heaven Realm, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor also knew about the division of strength of the Dao Ancestor level in the Divine Heaven Realm.

The four levels of the early stage, middle stage, late stage, and peak of the Merge Dao are only cultivation levels, which are different from the division of combat power.

The combat power of the Dao Ancestor of the Divine Heaven Realm is divided into nine heavens, which is somewhat similar to the division of forces.

Most of the Dao Ancestors in the early and middle stages of the Merge Dao are basically the First Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and the First Heavenly Dao Ancestors are also divided into the early stage, middle stage, late stage, and peak of the First Heavy Heavenly Dao.

Some Dao Ancestors in the late stage of Merge Dao and at the peak can be divided into Double Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and there are more Dao Ancestors at this level, which belong to the more common Dao Ancestors.

Above is the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, which is considered a relatively powerful Dao Ancestor.

According to the division of strength, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor estimated that he was the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he should belong to a relatively powerful category among the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

But above the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, there are also Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestors and Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestors......

The strongest Dao Ancestor is called the Ninefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, also known as the Invincible Dao Ancestor, and the Eightfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor is called the Strongest Dao Ancestor!

The invincible Dao Ancestor is extremely rare in the Divine Heaven Realm, and only one can be produced in countless eras, and the Eight Heavens Supreme Dao Ancestor has almost swept everything.

And this sword mark is very likely to be a sword cut by a Supreme Dao Ancestor, and there are still some traces of the Sword Dao of the Supreme Dao Ancestor on it.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor walked the Void Heaven Sword Dao, so this sword mark helped him a lot, and it might even help him step into the ranks of the Four Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

Therefore, after he discovered this sword mark, he occupied this ruin, and he has been here for enlightenment, and he will not be bothered by trivial matters in the outside world.

"Or send a message to Ye Tian's kid, pay attention in the future, don't make me so troubled that I will save him!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor thought so.

Immediately, he summoned Ye Tian, and continued to retreat to comprehend the sword marks.

At this time, Ye Tian was still in the small realm, and he could not be summoned by the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

This time it took Ye Tian a full year to heal, and it was still in a time-accelerated environment, and a large number of healing treasures were consumed, so it is conceivable that the impact of power on Ye Tian's injury is huge.

And after this fight, Ye Tian finally understood why many Dao Ancestors were injured once, and they needed a long time to heal, and even needed to sleep to heal.

Because Dao Ancestor is not injured easily, once he is injured, it must be an injury that is difficult to recover.

After his injuries healed, Ye Tian took out the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar, and he was going to refine the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar, so that he could be completely relieved.

The Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar is not a Dao weapon, and it doesn't need Dao power to refine it, otherwise Ye Tian wouldn't be able to refine it.

Strictly speaking, the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar was a special treasure created by a chaotic strange thing, so even if Ye Tian only had a True Monarch cultivation, he could refine it into his own weapon.

In this way, Ye Tian began to refine, and such a supreme treasure as the Heaven Splitting God Pillar, if you want to completely refine it in a day, it will take a long time, so Ye Tian will have time to form a large array, so he will not waste too much time.

As the days passed, the outside world was changing all the time, and the turmoil of Ye Tian's snatching of the Heaven Splitting God Pillar was gradually overshadowed by other events.

Half a year later.

Ye Tian is finally out of the customs!
